chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-5481 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of main case 27-02-2025 Syed Ali Ahmed Zaidi Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Aftab Akber, Advocate for Respondent No.4 Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Syed Hasnain Shah, Deputy Registrar (Legal & Technical) Cooperative Societies, Karachi Jehanzeb Baloch, Administrator of Respondent No.2 present in person Syed Hasnain Shah, Deputy Registrar (Legal & Technical) Cooperative Societies, Karachi states that the Respondent No.1 shall conduct an inquiry as sought in this petition and conclude the same expeditiously within one month after providing an opportunity of hearing to the Petitioners. Learned counsel for the Petitiones states that it may be just and proper that the petition to be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
